{# Translations consumed by the playground.js controller for runtime strings (status messages, output empty states). Static chrome strings above are rendered directly by Tera; this block covers what the JS inserts into the DOM at runtime. #} {% endblock layout %} {% block page_scripts %} {# CodeMirror is loaded from esm.sh. The `*` prefix on each URL externalises the package's peer dependencies, and this import map pins every shared module to ONE URL, so direct and transitive imports resolve to the same instance. Without this, `@codemirror/lang-php` ships its own copy of `@lezer/lr` and the PHP parser table fails to deserialise against the `@lezer/common` instance held by `@codemirror/state`. #} {% endblock page_scripts %}
